creator: dubik@eset.sk
text:
In your hardware release notes for FreeBSD version 7.2, in Sound cards
submenu is missing word. In this line:

[i386,amd64] The snd_emu10kx(4) driver does support the following sound
cards (although they have names similar to some supported ones)

is missing word NOT, because these are sound cards are NOT supported.
It confuses me for a while. The correct sentence is:

[i386,amd64] The snd_emu10kx(4) driver does NOT support the...
